name: arbiter_basic
description: Social interaction with a fixture NPC produces a real Arbiter verdict. Uses inject_npc before T2 to guarantee a visible Innkeeper (Thea) at the player's tile regardless of worldgen placement.
world_prompt: I am standing inside a roadside inn.

turns.label: npc_interaction
turns.action: I walk up to Thea and ask about a room for the night
